## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] ✨ **New Feature**: A non-breaking change which adds functionality.
- [ ] 🐛 **Bug Fix**: A non-breaking change which fixes an issue.
- [ ] 🧹 **Refactor**: Code changes that neither fix a bug nor add a feature.
- [ ] 🧪 **Testing**: Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests.
- [ ] 📝 **Docs**: Documentation only changes.

## ✅ Quality Checklist
- [ ] **Self-Review**: I have reviewed my own code for logic and style.
- [ ] **Formatting**: Code follows the project's style guide (e.g., `cargo fmt`).
- [ ] **Tests**: New and existing unit tests pass locally.
- [ ] **No Warnings**: The build produces no new compiler warnings.
- [ ] **Documentation**: I have updated the README or internal docs if necessary.
